data.title: Kanata kara
data.title_japanese: 彼方から
data.synopsis:
Noriko Tachiki has dreamt of a beautiful fantasy land for some time, though her friends think it is only her imagination. One day, on her way home, Noriko stumbles upon a bomb disguised as a paper bag that explodes right in front of her. However, instead of dying, she is transported to a mysterious forest full of strange plants and creatures.

As she begins navigating through the woods, Noriko is suddenly attacked by a giant, worm-like monster. Fortunately, she is saved by Izark Kia Tarj, a swordsman who does not speak her language. Lacking the strength to survive on her own, Noriko decides to follow her stoic savior, taking the opportunity to learn the foreign land's language and be more useful to Izark.

Unbeknownst to her, Noriko is a crucial piece of an ancient prophecy. She is "The Awakening"—a being destined to unleash the greatest evil known as the "Sky Demon." With influential people plotting to capture Noriko for her supposed powers, both she and Izark must fend for themselves and overcome a future laced with chaos.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai
Aren't You Too Sweet Salt-God Sato-san?
塩対応の佐藤さんが俺にだけ甘い
The Cold Sato-san is Only Sweet to Me

data.title: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai
data.title_english: The Cold Sato-san is Only Sweet to Me
data.title_japanese: 塩対応の佐藤さんが俺にだけ甘い
title_synonyms: Aren't You Too Sweet Salt-God Sato-san?
data.synopsis:
Koharu Satou is known to her classmates as the "unattainable flower" a cold and distant girl whose refusal to smile keeps everyone at arm's length.

However, Souta Oshio accidentally stumbles upon Satou's secret at her family's cafe. It turns out the "icy Satou-san" is actually an incredibly shy and clumsy girl who struggles even with something as simple as taking photos of sweets for the cafe's social media.

Bonding over their shared love for cameras and desserts, the distance between the two gradually shrinks. This charming romantic comedy follows two socially awkward people as they navigate their feelings in a story that is as sweet as it is endearing.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: Zatsuyou Fuyo Jutsushi ga Jibun no Saikyou ni Kizuku made
Until the Chore Granting Sorcerer Realized His Strongest
雑用付与術師が自分の最強に気付くまで
Magical Buffs: The Support Caster Is Stronger Than He Realized!

data.title: Zatsuyou Fuyo Jutsushi ga Jibun no Saikyou ni Kizuku made
data.title_english: Magical Buffs: The Support Caster Is Stronger Than He Realized!
data.title_japanese: 雑用付与術師が自分の最強に気付くまで
title_synonyms: Until the Chore Granting Sorcerer Realized His Strongest
data.synopsis:
Wim Strauss is a "granting caster"—a support mage who can increase the strength of his allies through the power of his spells. It's a useful talent, but since it can't be used directly in battle, it gets zero respect from the other members of his party. As far as they're concerned, support magic is dead weight. It isn't long before they toss him out on his ear, leaving Wim to wonder if his career as an adventurer is over.

Lucky for Wim, he has one big chance: his childhood friend Heidemarie is able to get him an audition with her elite A-rank party, Nachtlibelle. The two of them know his magic is good for more than just menial backup, but now he'll have to prove it. It's time to show the world that support mages can do more than just stand on the back lines!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

data.title: Running Man Season 2
data.title_japanese: 런닝맨 시즌 2
data.synopsis:
Not long after they had sealed Ulcus and brought peace back to the world, the Running Men were suddenly captured and transported into an unknown world! The Running Men are now forced into a survival game where they fight against a whole different race in order to get an opportunity to return back into their own world. 

(Source: Running Man Animation Wiki)
